Run out of pots & bots? Need some Weeds and Browncoats to summon? No problem! This pack guarantees 5 consumable items that can help you in your fight.
This Helpful Fun Pack of 5 items is a mix of both customization items and consumable items. Guaranteed to have at least one Uncommon item.
This Extraordinary Pack of 6 items contains a good mix of customization items and consumable items. Guaranteed to have at least one Rare item and a high likelihood of a Rare character piece.
The Wondrous Pack contains 7 items, and is guaranteed to contain at least one Super Rare item or consumable, and has the best likelihood of a Legendary item.
This phenomenal pack contains 5 items, choose this and you are guaranteed to get enough stickers to unlock a Rare or Super Rare character.
